title: Janus KI Response
description: Schema for the JANUS_KI_RESPONSE_V1 import format used by AI assistants to propose changes to a JANUS7 campaign state.

version.description: The fixed version identifier for KI responses.

sourceExportMeta.description: Metadata copied from the original export bundle that the AI processed. Contents are not validated beyond being an object.

changes.description: Top-level container for arrays of updates to various academy domains.

items.description: A patch operation to modify a calendar field.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the academy.calendar tree that should be modified.

op.description: The patch operation: replace sets the value at path, append adds to an array at path, delete removes the property.

value.description: The new value for replace or append operations.

calendarUpdates.description: Array of calendar patch objects. Each entry describes a patch operation on the academy calendar.

items.description: A patch operation to modify lessons.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the academy.lessons tree that should be modified.

value.description: The new value for replace or append operations.

items.description: A patch operation to modify events.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the academy.events tree.

value.description: The new value for replace or append operations.

items.description: A patch operation to modify scoring.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the academy.scoring tree.

value.description: New value for replace or append operations.

items.description: A patch operation to modify social relationships.

path.description: Dot-delimited path into the academy.social tree.

value.description: New value for replace or append.

items.description: A journal entry to append to the academy.journalEntries array.

journalEntries.description: Array of new or updated journal entries proposed by the AI. Each journal entry is appended to the journal.

notes.description: Optional explanatory notes from the AI regarding its proposed changes.
